page_title: Fullmetal Alchemist and The Broken Angel Soundtrack
text:
The Original Soundtrack Fullmetal Alchemist and The Broken Angel (Hagane no Renkinjutsushi - Tobenai Tenshi as it is known in Japan) was released December 25th, 2003 in Japan as a CD and later in America on February 18th, 2004 by Aniplex. This album can still be purchased on Amazon Japan today.

Trivia

This soundtrack was made specifically for the game of the same name.
There are other names specifically for this Soundtrack: "Fullmetal Alchemist Shoenai (also spelled 'Shonen' from some sources) Angel Game Original Soundtrack."

Download

You can also download the Soundtrack from Zophar's Domain, although the titles are not all the same for some of the Tracks.
